info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' tanUkaraRam - sTUlasya kAzWAdeH katipayAvayavApanayanena sUkzmakaraRam ' iti bAlamanoramA  ' syAt takzatIti tvacaneTa vA SnO takzRoti takzecca tanUkriyAyAm ' ( Slo. 183) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tejo ha vA etad vanaspatInAM yadbAhyaSakalastasmAdyadA bAhyaSakalamapatakzRuvanyaTa Suzyanti' (Sa॰brA॰3.7.1.8) apatakzRuvanti=takzaRena pfTakkurvanti
'avatakzaRAnAM svaruraDimanTaSca' (Apa0 SrO0 7133) takzyamARasya yUpasya SakalAnAm ityarTaH avaSabdo'DastAdarTe aDaH patitaKaRqAnAm ityuktaM Bavati
'yato dyAvApfTivI nizwatakzuH' (tE0 brA0 2896) nizwatakzuH=nistatakzuH takzaRena nirmamire
'Atakzya takzARa ivAparezAM gAtrARi' (avadA0 jA0 2925) Atakzya santakzya
'uttakzataM svaryaM parvateByaH' (aTarva0 844) uttakzatam udDftya takzatam saMBaratam svaryyaM svaraRArhamAyuDam
